error_signature: Method not allowed - please check you are using the right HTTP method
title: WooCommerce update product method not allowed
symptom: When attempting to update a product in WooCommerce via n8n, the error 'Method not allowed - please check you are using the right HTTP method' is displayed.
root_cause: The error occurs when a plugin, such as 'Really Simple SSL', interferes with the HTTP request method used for updating products in WooCommerce. This can prevent the correct HTTP method from being processed, leading to a 405 error.
fix_steps: Identify and disable any conflicting plugins, such as 'Really Simple SSL'.
Test the product update functionality again in n8n.
agent_instruction: Disable the 'Really Simple SSL' plugin and retry updating the product.
